zh.lifeSummary: Anselm Bray是Ebenezer Bray和Penelope的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anselm Bray是Ebenezer Bray和Penelope的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Bray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Berkshire and Devon. The former is probably named with Old French bray ‘marsh’, the latter from the Cornish element bre ‘hill’.
English: perhaps a topographic name from northern Middle English bra ‘steep (river) bank’ or ‘brow of a hill’, denoting someone who lived at such a place.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy or Picardy called Bray (Eure, Calvados, Aisne, Somme); see 6.

variants.name: Dubray
meanings: French: habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone from any of various minor places called Bray (see Bray ).
Altered form of French   Dubreuil  . This surname is common among Native Americans, namely the Cheyenne River Sioux in SD.

variants.name: Braye
meanings: English (Sussex): from the Middle English female personal name Braye. Its origin is unknown but it might derive from Breton bregh ‘fine, brave’.

variants.name: Brais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Aldea, Andre, Cecile, Fernande, Stephane.

nameMeanings.name: Anselm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, a compound of ans ‘divinity’ + helm ‘helmet’. It was brought from Italy to England by St Anselm , who was Archbishop of Canterbury in the late 11th and early 12th centuries, and is regarded as one of the Doctors of the Church. The name is now relatively infrequent and used mainly by Roman Catholics.

en.lifeSummary: Anselm Bray was born as the son of Ebenezer Bray and Penelope. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Anselm Bray est né, fils d’Ebenezer Bray et Penelope. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Anselm Bray wurde, als Sohn von Ebenezer Bray und Penelope geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Anselm Bray è nato il come figlio di Ebenezer Bray e Penelope. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Anselm BrayはEbenezer BrayとPenelopeの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Anselm Bray(은)는 Ebenezer Bray(와)과 Penelope의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anselm Bray nasceu filho de Ebenezer Bray e Penelope. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Anselm Bray родился. Его родителей звали Ebenezer Bray и Penelope. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Anselm Bray nació como hijo de Ebenezer Bray y Penelope. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
